tagline: Manufacturer of flight control actuators, propulsion systems, gimbals, motor controllers, and turret stabilization systems for defense platforms including missiles, combat vehicles, and spacecraft. Production-ready across multiple unmanned-systems categories. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of current unmanned-systems program participation is limited despite broad component relevance to UAS architectures.
